movie.actors: Keanu Reeves, Rachel Weisz, Shia LaBeouf, Djimon Hounsou
movie.plot: Supernatural detective John Constantine helps a policewoman prove her sister's death was not a suicide, but something more.
movie.title: Constantine
movie.writer: Jamie Delano (comic book "Hellblazer"), Garth Ennis (comic book "Hellblazer"), Kevin Brodbin (story), Kevin Brodbin (screenplay), Frank A. Cappello (screenplay)
